title: Semantic HTML Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of the essential tags for adding meaning to your HTML documents.

questions.question: Which tag should you use for the dominant, central content of a webpage?
Which tag defines a set of navigation links?
What is the result of using semantic HTML tags?
options: They automatically style the content with colors and fonts.
They make the webpage load faster.
They provide meaning to the content for accessibility and SEO.
They are required by all browsers to display content at all.

questions.question: Which tag is best for grouped content that is tangentially related to the main page content (like a sidebar)?
What does the 'datetime' attribute in the <time> tag do?
options: It sets the visual format of the date shown on screen.
It provides a machine-readable version of the date for search engines.
It sets the timezone for the user's browser.
It triggers a calendar widget in all browsers.
